title: fsl-mcp sync: expose the v11 systems/factories/statechart surface
manager: Keep fsl-mcp current with v11. Systems, factories, supervision, and statechart structure (hierarchy, parallel regions) become authorable, so the MCP must validate and explain composed multi-machine structure, not just single machines.
cs: Extend fsl_validate / fsl_explain / fsl_render for systems, factories, and statechart hierarchy/parallel regions; describe supervision topology.
